title: bergenia fortunei
intro: Bergenia fortunei, also known as the 'Gold Bullion' or 'Elephant Ears', is a species of flowering plant in the saxifrage family, native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as bergenin and saponins. The health benefits of Bergenia fortunei include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Bergenia fortunei can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, with the dried roots and leaves being used in various herbal preparations.
